data.name: Kristaps
data.pain_point: Get more solar panel installation deals. I need to make more money for my family
data.concept_useful: Yes, but it sounds overly complicated and like I wouldn't own the data. Also, it sounds like it wouldn't work well before network effects at least at the start?
data.privacy_score: Super important if its some big corporation or government
data.try_score: It all depends on how iseful it is and how smooth is the user experience
data.objection: Knowing that my data is being used against me, confusing user experience, no real value, constant  overpromises and underdelovery
